title: cleyera panamensis
intro: Cleyera panamensis, also known as Panama gold or golden cleyera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, native to Central America and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleyera panamensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Cleyera panamensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address various health issues.
